summary: The hydrated artifact splits this over-broad cluster into three families. The bootstrap-file allowlist docs family around #45228 is blocked by the security boundary and gets no ProjectClownfish mutation. The non-security docs-gap family keeps #47558 as the canonical issue and uses #59658 as the narrowest repairable PR path via the attached fix artifact. The stacked exec-approvals and Telegram PRs (#56163, #56319) are independent follow-up work for #44298 and #56286, not part of the canonical docs-gap cleanup.
